title: feat: add Seraphyn as community provider (qwen3-tts)
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Seraphyn joins the swarm
gist.blurb: We've teamed up with community provider Seraphyn to bring you qwen3-tts! You can now generate audio with custom voice instructions, straight from the hive.
gist.summary: Added Seraphyn as a new community AI provider, integrating the qwen3-tts audio model with instruction-based voice control.
gist.impact: Users can now generate speech using the qwen3-tts model and customize the voice style by passing descriptive instructions via the system prompt.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces a new text-to-speech model and a new community provider. Visuals should focus on audio generation, voice, and collaboration. Polly the bee in a cozy recording studio setup, wearing headphones and using a retro microphone, representing the new voice capabilities.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing chunky retro studio headphones, speaking into a glowing vintage microphone. A retro mixing console nearby displays soft pastel soundwaves. Lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
